allow: PowerShell(pnpm --filter @restaurant-platform/dashboard add reka-ui class-variance-authority clsx tailwind-merge 2>&1)

PowerShell($current = pnpm --filter @restaurant-platform/dashboard exec nuxt typecheck 2>&1 | Out-String; $errs = $current -split "`n" | Where-Object { $_ -match 'error TS' }; "TOTAL: $\($errs.Count\)"; "`nin my files:"; $errs | Where-Object { $_ -match 'pages/\(users|posts|orders|menu|tables|reservations|restaurant-settings|index|login\)|components/\(BaseModal|BaseWizardModal|DeleteConfirmModal|base/|ui/\)|layouts/default|lib/utils|packages/types/post' })
